author: Aaij, Roel and others
title: Measurement of $CP$-Averaged Observables in the $B^{0}\rightarrow K^{*0}\mu^{+}\mu^{-}$ Decay
abstract: an angular analysis of the $B^0\to K^{\ast0} (\to K^+ \pi^-) \mu^+\mu^-$ decay using a data set corresponding to an integrated luminosity of $4.7 {\rm fb}^{−1}$ of $pp$ collision data, with the full set of CP-averaged observables in bins of the invariant mass squared of the dimuon system
